name: 48ct Easter Plastic Eggs Mixed Colors - Spritz™
description: Step into the Easter celebrations with these 48-ct Easter Plastic Eggs from Spritz™. You can incorporate these eggs into your home decor to give a cute and personal finish. These refillable eggs can be used to hide surprises. These Easter Plastic Eggs from Spritz are perfect for candy, small toys, money and more. You get 48 plastic eggs in assorted colors for egg hunting, decorations, and to fill with treats.
